name: Slack

composio_registry_match.name: Slack
composio_registry_match.description: Slack is a channel-based messaging platform. With Slack, people can work together more effectively, connect all their software tools and services, and find the information they need to do their best work - all within a secure, enterprise-grade environment.

description: Slack is a cloud-based collaboration hub that connects people, information, and tools through channels and messaging.
notes: Relied heavily on prior knowledge of api.slack.com for Slack's REST API architecture and token structure. Page mentions new native Slackbot MCP integrations.
